description: A graduate student needs a book for their research that is not available in the university's library system.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and collect the bibliographic information for the requested book (title, author, ISBN).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary details for the book.

nodes.task_description: Search the national interlibrary loan (ILL) database to find a library that has the book.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds three libraries that own the book and can lend it.

nodes.task_description: Submit the ILL request to the lending library and inform the student of the estimated arrival time.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully places the request and communicates the timeline to the student.
